notes: Chunk contains a single event: part 2 of 2 of the 2024-10-29 earnings call Q&A transcript; no fiscal_kpis field on this chunk (KPIs only on chunk_001).

Skipped 2 vague items: 'operational effectiveness' (too broad to name a causal variable) and bare 'more sales' (bare category word; its margin effect is captured as sales_leverage where the source ties sales to leveraging margins).
menu_pricing: source says only 'catching up on the pricing' in a restaurant-concept context; rewrote to the standard restaurant phrase per R4 rather than a bare 'pricing'.
four_wall_margin chosen over 'unit level margin' wording: same cause discussed in both Q&A exchanges ('unit level margins' and 'company level four wall'); deduped to the standard whole phrase.
north_italia_segment_margin is a brand/segment-level driver (brand metrics allowed); kept separate from company-level four_wall_margin per R9.
lease_accounting named as a reusable accounting-standard class (no instance binding); state ('100 basis points swing') left out of the name.
